data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for provider visibility of completion status, but the evidence does not demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or validated. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing completion percentages, there is no concrete evidence of how this visibility is achieved or what specific endpoints or data are involved. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process, as the requirement is not supported by sufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of how provider visibility of completion status is implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add provider dashboard validation endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the provider dashboard accurately reflects the completion status of tasks.
